001package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity;
002
003import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnore;
004import jakarta.persistence.Column;
005import jakarta.persistence.Convert;
006import jakarta.persistence.Entity;
007import jakarta.persistence.FetchType;
008import jakarta.persistence.GeneratedValue;
009import jakarta.persistence.GenerationType;
010import jakarta.persistence.Id;
011import jakarta.persistence.Index;
012import jakarta.persistence.JoinColumn;
013import jakarta.persistence.ManyToOne;
014import jakarta.persistence.PrePersist;
015import jakarta.persistence.Table;
016import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.converter.UriAttributeConverter;
017import java.net.URI;
018import java.util.UUID;
019
020/**
021 * JPA entity representing an image associated with an {@link IssueReport}.
022 */
023@Entity
024@Table(
025  name = "report_image",
026  indexes = {
027    @Index(name = "ix_report_image_issue_report_id", columnList = "issue_report_id")
028  }
029)
030public class ReportImage {
031
032  @Id
033  @Column(name = "report_image_id", updatable = false)
034  @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)
035  @JsonIgnore
036  private Long id;
037
038  @Column(name = "report_image_external_id", updatable = false)
039  private UUID externalId;
040
041  // used AI to help with ManyToOne annotation
042  @ManyToOne(fetch = FetchType.LAZY, optional = false)
043  @JoinColumn(name = "issue_report_id", nullable = false, updatable = false)
044  @JsonIgnore
045  private IssueReport issueReport;
046
047  @Convert(converter = UriAttributeConverter.class)
048  @Column(nullable = false, updatable = false, length = 255, columnDefinition = "varchar(255)")
049  private URI imageLocator;
050
051  @Column(nullable = false, updatable = false)
052  private String filename;
053
054  @Column(nullable = false, updatable = false)
055  private String mimeType;
056
057  @Column(nullable = false, updatable = false)
058  private int albumOrder;
059
060  /**
061   * Returns the database identifier for this image.
062   *
063   * @return primary key value.
064   */
065  public Long getId() {
066    return id;
067  }
068
069  /**
070   * Returns the parent report.
071   *
072   * @return issue report.
073   */
074  public IssueReport getIssueReport() {
075    return issueReport;
076  }
077
078  /**
079   * Sets the parent report.
080   *
081   * @param issueReport issue report.
082   */
083  public void setIssueReport(IssueReport issueReport) {
084    this.issueReport = issueReport;
085  }
086
087  /**
088   * Returns the stored content locator for this image.
089   *
090   * @return image locator URI.
091   */
092  public URI getImageLocator() {
093    return imageLocator;
094  }
095
096  /**
097   * Sets the stored content locator for this image.
098   *
099   * @param imageLocator image locator URI.
100   */
101  public void setImageLocator(URI imageLocator) {
102    this.imageLocator = imageLocator;
103  }
104
105  /**
106   * Returns the original filename.
107   *
108   * @return filename.
109   */
110  public String getFilename() {
111    return filename;
112  }
113
114  /**
115   * Sets the original filename.
116   *
117   * @param filename filename.
118   */
119  public void setFilename(String filename) {
120    this.filename = filename;
121  }
122
123  /**
124   * Returns the MIME type of the image.
125   *
126   * @return MIME type.
127   */
128  public String getMimeType() {
129    return mimeType;
130  }
131
132  /**
133   * Sets the MIME type of the image.
134   *
135   * @param mimeType MIME type.
136   */
137  public void setMimeType(String mimeType) {
138    this.mimeType = mimeType;
139  }
140
141  /**
142   * Returns the album order index used for sorting images within a report.
143   *
144   * @return album order.
145   */
146  public int getAlbumOrder() {
147    return albumOrder;
148  }
149
150  /**
151   * Sets the album order index used for sorting images within a report.
152   *
153   * @param albumOrder album order.
154   */
155  public void setAlbumOrder(int albumOrder) {
156    this.albumOrder = albumOrder;
157  }
158
159  /**
160   * Returns the external identifier for this image.
161   *
162   * @return external ID.
163   */
164  public UUID getExternalId() {
165    return externalId;
166  }
167
168  @PrePersist
169  void onCreate() {
170    this.externalId = UUID.randomUUID();
171  }
172}
